title: cache-with-label-validation in get_cached_or_scan is correct and should be defended
description: get_cached_or_scan validates the cached NVM ID via nvm_metadata() before using it, rather than blindly trusting the cache. This correctly handles the case where another client deleted and recreated the NVM object under a different ID. A future contributor might suggest 'simplify by removing the validation and just trusting the cached ID.' That would reintroduce stale-cache bugs. The extra round-trip is O(1) and always correct; the optimization of skipping it trades a round-trip for a class of hard-to-reproduce bugs.
